unit: Unit 12: Everyday Life with Your Computer
title: Notes and Documents
drDigitalIntro: The Notes app is perfect for quick ideas, shopping lists, recipes, and anything you want to remember. Notes sync across all your devices via the cloud. For longer documents — letters, reports, essays — use a word processor like Google Docs, Microsoft Word, or LibreOffice. You can create a new note by pressing Ctrl+N in the Notes app. Notes can include text, photos, checklists, and sketches.
